# Rf

**Summary**: An ensemble learning method that operates by constructing a multitude of decision trees at supervised learning.

---

## How It Is Used in the Thesis Collection

- [[2021-alsaihati|Alsaihati, 2021]] used RF to predict loss rates and compare against other ML models.
